recent_excerpts: A vulnerability (CVE-2026-32183) in the Microsoft Windows Snipping Tool allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a malicious file or webpage, requiring only user interaction to trigger th
A proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-39808, a critical command injection vulnerability in Fortinet FortiSandbox, has been released.
A security researcher has published proof-of-concept exploits for two new zero-day flaws in Microsoft Defender, dubbed RedSun and UnDefend.
